title: castilleja lentii
intro: Castilleja lentii, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It is a hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants. The plant's leaves and stems contain a number of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which have been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Castilleja lentii has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
